div.div:
With the highest kaiju-emergence rates in the world, Japan is no stranger to attack by deadly monsters. Enter the Japan Defense Force, a military organization tasked with the neutralization of kaiju. Kafka Hibino, a kaiju-corpse cleanup man, has always dreamed of joining the force. But when he gets another shot at achieving his childhood dream, he undergoes an unexpected transformation. How can he fight kaiju now that he’s become one himself?!
(Source: VIZ Media)
Comedy, Sci-Fi, Slice of Life, Supernatural

The comedy manga centers around a super-powered girl named Hina and Nitta, a young member of the yakuza. Hina suddenly appears in Nitta's room and threatens him with her extraordinary powers. However, they end up living together.
(Source: Anime News Network)
Ore dake Level Up na Ken: Season 2 - Arise from the Shadow
The second season of Solo Leveling. Mastering his new abilities in secret, Jin-U must battle humanity's toughest foes to save his mother. (Source: Crunchyroll News)

Timid Tadano is a total wallflower, and that’s just the way he likes it. But all that changes when he finds himself alone in a classroom on the first day of high school with the legendary Komi. He quickly realizes she isn’t aloof—she’s just super awkward. Now he’s made it his mission to help her on her quest to make 100 friends! (Source: VIZ Media) Notes: - Winner of the 67th Shogakukan Manga Award in the Shounen Category in 2021. - Includes 37 extra chapters.

In a world where awakened beings called “Hunters” must battle deadly monsters to protect humanity, Seong Jin-U, nicknamed “the weakest hunter of all mankind,” finds himself in a constant struggle for survival. One day, after a brutal encounter in an overpowered dungeon wipes out his party and threatens to end his life, a mysterious System chooses him as its sole player: Jin-U has been granted the rare opportunity to level up his abilities, possibly beyond any known limits. Follow Jin-U’s journey as he takes on ever-stronger enemies, both human and monster, to discover the secrets deep within the dungeons and the ultimate extent of his powers. (Source: Tappytoon) Note: Includes 22 extra chapters.

At the age of eight, I-Jin Yu lost his parents in a plane crash and became stranded in a foreign land, forced to become a child mercenary in order to stay alive. He returns home ten years later to be reunited with his family in Korea, where food and shelter are plenty and everything seems peaceful. But I-Jin will soon learn that life as a teenager is a whole other feat of survival. With only one year of high school left, I-Jin must master new tactics to maneuver his way around the schoolhouse battleground. Can he survive a year of high school? Or rather, will the school be able to survive him?
(Source: WEBTOON)
Osananajimi Kanojo no Morahara ga Hidoi n de Zetsuen Sengen Shite Yatta: Jibun Rashiku Ikiru Koto ni Shitara, Naze ka Tonari no Seki no Kakure Bishoujo kara Kokuhaku Sareta

I, Soma Ichinose, a high school boy, is continuously harassed by my former childhood friend and current girlfriend, Hanabi Kisaragi. I finally reach my limit and decide to break up with her. I won't be tormented by that devilish girlfriend anymore, and I'll live my life the way I want to, for the better. Now that I'm no longer under Hanabi's spell, I can begin to enjoy my school life to the fullest. Yes, it's not too late. The girl sitting next to me, Fumi Yukiyo, wears large glasses give her a strong impression of being stand-offish from the other students. But in the course of conversation with her, I noticed that her personality is the complete opposite of Hanabi's, and I find myself falling for her...?

(Source: Dash X Bunko, translated)

It's been 68 years since the Culling Game. In 2086, an alien race known as the Simurians arrive on Earth in a spaceship. The fate of the world lies in the hands of two jujutsu sorcerers Yuka and Tsurugi Okkotsu. Jujutsu sorcerers and aliens, what chaos will be born from this meeting?
(Source: MANGA Plus)

After illegal human replication services begin spreading through the underground, tragedy strikes, a plane crash takes the life of his newlywed wife. Consumed by grief and temptation, he faces an impossible question: Should he bring her back by copying her? But when memory, identity, and love can all be replicated, one unsettling doubt remains, is the person who returns truly her, or just a perfect imitation?
(Source: Webnovel)
